untranslatable_reason: Head and Shoulders Bottom pattern requires multi-bar structure identification (left shoulder, head, right shoulder with specific price relationships) that cannot be fully expressed with single-bar indicator conditions. The pattern involves identifying two valleys of similar depth with a higher peak between them. While reversal characteristics (price_pos_20 < 0.3, trend confirmation via ADX and SMA) can be approximated, the precise geometric pattern structure requires pattern recognition logic beyond available indicator operators.
